paragraphs: Building products for the next generation of Sri Lanka.

contact.subtitle: I'm open to internships, collaborations, and weird side projects with people who care.

projects.title: ForFuture
projects.desc: An AI-powered civic engagement platform that empowers young people to create meaningful social impact through volunteering, campaigns, petitions, AI-assisted idea generation, and community collaboration. Built to solve real-world challenges by connecting youth with opportunities to make a difference.

projects.title: NusaifOS Portfolio
projects.desc: A premium personal developer portfolio built with modern web technologies, smooth animations, responsive design, and a clean user experience. It showcases my projects, technical skills, and passion for building high-quality digital products.

building.text: I'm an enthusiastic software developer, creative innovator, and problem solver who enjoys transforming ideas into impactful digital products. My focus is on Full-Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, UI/UX, and scalable web applications. I continuously learn, experiment, and build solutions that solve real-world problems while exploring emerging technologies.

experience.title: Software Engineering Student
experience.desc: Building foundations in CS, software design, and systems.

experience.title: Robotics Competition — MicroMaze
experience.desc: Designed and programmed a maze-solving robot from scratch.

experience.title: Hackathon Finalist
experience.desc: Shipped prototypes spanning civic-tech, AI assistants and games.

experience.title: Leadership
experience.desc: Mentoring peers and organizing community coding sessions.

experience.title: Volunteer Work
experience.desc: Volunteering for education and youth empowerment programs.
